title: Phan Bo Giam Gia Hoa Don Vao Tung Hang Hoa
module: Bao cao ban hang theo hang hoa
author: Product Team
context: Khi thu ngan giam gia tay tren toan bo hoa don (vi du: hoa don 500,000d -> giam 100,000d), he thong can phan bo khoan giam nay xuong tung dong hang hoa theo ty le gia tri.

userStory.iWant: He thong tu dong phan bo khoan giam gia tay tren hoa don xuong tung dong hang hoa theo ty le gia tri cua moi item
userStory.soThat: Bao cao hang hoa hien thi dung Doanh thu thuan va Chenh lech cho tung san pham

example.description: Hoa don goc: 3 items, tong 500,000d, thu ngan giam tay 100,000d

acceptanceCriteria.title: Phan bo dung theo ty le
acceptanceCriteria.given: Mot hoa don co N items, tong gia tri T, thu ngan giam tay D
acceptanceCriteria.when: Hoa don duoc hoan thanh (trang thai: Hoan thanh)
acceptanceCriteria.then: Moi item[i] duoc gan discount_allocated[i] = D x (line_total[i] / T). Dung Largest Remainder Method de lam tron. SUM(discount_allocated) = D

acceptanceCriteria.title: Hien thi tren Bao cao hang hoa
acceptanceCriteria.given: Bao cao Ban hang theo hang hoa duoc mo
acceptanceCriteria.when: Co hoa don giam gia tay trong ky
acceptanceCriteria.then: Moi dong giao dich hien thi: Gia tri niem yet, Doanh thu thuan, Chenh lech (mau do neu am)

acceptanceCriteria.title: Ghi chu nguon giam
acceptanceCriteria.given: Hoa don co giam gia tay
acceptanceCriteria.then: Footer ghi ro: (Da phan bo giam gia hoa don, giam gia phieu tra)

flow:
[THU NGAN]
    |
    v
Tao order -> Them items vao hoa don
    |
    v
Ap dung giam gia tay
    |
    v
Hoan thanh thanh toan
    |
    v
--- TRIGGER: On Invoice Complete ---
    |
    v
[BACKEND - Discount Allocation Service]
    |- Lay invoice.discount_amount (D)
    |- Lay danh sach line_items[]
    |- Tinh total = SUM(line_total[i])
    |- FOR each item[i]: allocated[i] = FLOOR(D x line_total[i] / total)
    |- Largest Remainder cho phan du
    L- SUM CHECK: SUM(allocated) == D

edgeCases.handle: Toan bo giam gia ve item do
Validate: khong cho giam vuot tong
Bo qua item do trong phan bo

notes: Khong tinh lai discount_allocated khi chi xem bao cao
Neu hoa don bi sua lai sau hoan thanh -> trigger tinh lai phan bo
Log moi truong hop SUM(allocated) != D de debug
Don vi tinh: VND nguyen (integer), khong dung float
